# Gene expression in TS and VR specific TCRs {#sec-gene-exp-plots}

# Heatmaps and dotplots of TS and VR specific TCRs

# Libraries
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(wesanderson)
library(ggplotify)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggrepel)
library(tidyverse)
library(infer)
library(RANN)
library(muscat)
library(limma)
library(purrr)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(ProjecTILs)
library(readxl)
library(UpSetR)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

source("../source_scripts/slideseq_functions_main.R")

options(Seurat.object.assay.version = 'v5')

colors <- structure(c("grey95", rep(c(paletteer::paletteer_d("khroma::smoothrainbow"), paletteer::paletteer_d("khroma::lapaz"), paletteer::paletteer_d("khroma::tokyo"), paletteer::paletteer_d("khroma::buda")), 10)), names = as.character(c(0:8019)))

set.seed(123)
```

# Set definitions of "far" and "near"
```{r}
lower_radius.vec <- c(0, 100)
upper_radius.vec <- c(30, 145)
```

# Load objects
```{r}
P102TA_10_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck10_102TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P102TA_17_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck17_102TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P102TA_33_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck33_102TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P102TA_39_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck39_102TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")

P107TA_15_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck15_107TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P107TA_18_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck18_107TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P107TA_20_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck20_107TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")

P108TA_26_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck26_108TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P108TA_29_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck29_108TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P108TA_30_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck30_108TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P108TA_32_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck32_108TA_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")

P108TB_06_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck06_108TB_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
P108TB_14_RNA <- readRDS("../objects/02_Puck14_108TB_TCR_RNA_area_121125.Rds")
```

## Assign celltypes
```{r}
P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
P102TA_17_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_17_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P102TA_17_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)

P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)

P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data %>%
  assign_celltypes() %>%
  order_celltypes()
P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(assignment1)
```

# Remove empty beads
```{r}
P102TA_10_RNA <- subset(P102TA_10_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
P102TA_17_RNA <- subset(P102TA_17_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
P102TA_33_RNA <- subset(P102TA_33_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
P102TA_39_RNA <- subset(P102TA_39_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)

P108TA_26_RNA <- subset(P108TA_26_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
P108TA_29_RNA <- subset(P108TA_29_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
P108TA_30_RNA <- subset(P108TA_30_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
P108TA_32_RNA <- subset(P108TA_32_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)

P108TB_06_RNA <- subset(P108TB_06_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
P108TB_14_RNA <- subset(P108TB_14_RNA, subset = area == "Empty", invert = TRUE)
```

# Remove extra columns
## P102
```{r}
P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  select(-c(puck10_count, log_puck10_count, largest_clone_id))
```

## P107
```{r}
P107TA_15_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_15_RNA@meta.data %>%
  select(-c(puck15_count, log_puck15_count, largest_clone_id))
P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data %>%
  select(-c(puck18_count, log_puck18_count, largest_clone_id))
P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data %>%
  select(-c(puck20_count, log_puck20_count, largest_clone_id))
```

## P108
```{r}
P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  select(-c(puck06_count, log_puck06_count, largest_clone_id))
```

# Explore the scRNA derived phenotypes of the shared clones
## Open scRNA derived phenotypes
```{r}
scrna_phenotypes <- read.csv("../objects/reformatted_RCC_slideseq_parameters_052925.csv")

clones_of_int <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  filter(tumor_specific == TRUE | virus_reactive == TRUE) %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone) %>%
  pull(sctcr_clone)

phenotype_md <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  filter(sctcr_clone %in% clones_of_int,
         (tumor_specific == TRUE | virus_reactive == TRUE)) %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone, tumor_specific, virus_reactive) %>%
  mutate(specificity = case_when(tumor_specific == TRUE ~ "TS",
                                 virus_reactive == TRUE ~ "VR")) %>%
  select(sctcr_clone, specificity)
```

## Get clones of interest
```{r}
P102T_md <- rbind(P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data, P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data, P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data)

P107T_md <- rbind(P107TA_15_RNA@meta.data, P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data, 
                        P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data)

P108T_md <- rbind(P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data, P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data, 
                        P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data, P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data)

P102T_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P102T_md, get_unique_productive_clones(clones_of_int)) %>%
  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(phenotype_md, by = c("clone_id" = "sctcr_clone"))

P107T_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P107T_md, get_unique_productive_clones(clones_of_int)) %>%
  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(phenotype_md, by = c("clone_id" = "sctcr_clone"))

P108T_clones_counts <- count_clones_by_annotated_area(P108T_md, get_unique_productive_clones(clones_of_int)) %>%
  group_by(clone_id) %>%
  summarize(sum_count = sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(phenotype_md, by = c("clone_id" = "sctcr_clone"))
  
P102T_clones_counts %>%
  arrange(sum_count)

P107T_clones_counts %>%
  arrange(sum_count)

P108T_clones_counts %>%
  arrange(sum_count)

# Separate TS and VR clones
P102T_TS_clones <- P102T_clones_counts %>%
  filter(specificity == "TS") %>%
  pull(clone_id)
P102T_VR_clones <- P102T_clones_counts %>%
  filter(specificity == "VR") %>%
  pull(clone_id)

P107T_TS_clones <- P107T_clones_counts %>%
  filter(specificity == "TS") %>%
  pull(clone_id)
P107T_VR_clones <- P107T_clones_counts %>%
  filter(specificity == "VR") %>%
  pull(clone_id)

P108T_TS_clones <- P108T_clones_counts %>%
  filter(specificity == "TS") %>%
  pull(clone_id)
P108T_VR_clones <- P108T_clones_counts %>%
  filter(specificity == "VR") %>%
  pull(clone_id)

# Separate non-TS or VR clones
P102T_other_clones <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  filter(str_detect(sctcr_clone, "p102"),
         !(sctcr_clone %in% c(P102T_clones_counts$clone_id))) %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone) %>%
  pull(sctcr_clone)

P107T_other_clones <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  filter(str_detect(sctcr_clone, "p107"),
         !(sctcr_clone %in% c(P107T_clones_counts$clone_id))) %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone) %>%
  pull(sctcr_clone)

P108T_other_clones <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  filter(str_detect(sctcr_clone, "p108"),
         !(sctcr_clone %in% c(P108T_clones_counts$clone_id))) %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone) %>%
  pull(sctcr_clone)
  
```

# Cast beads with multiple TS or VR clones to the smaller clone
```{r}
cast_clones <- function(md){
  md <- md %>%
    mutate(final_clone_id = case_when(str_detect(clone_id, "p102_312($|,)") ~ "p102_312",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_189($|,)") ~ "p108_189",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_277($|,)") ~ "p108_277",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p102_564($|,)") ~ "p102_564",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_271($|,)") ~ "p108_271",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_395($|,)") ~ "p108_395",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_244($|,)") ~ "p108_244",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p102_341	($|,)") ~ "p102_341	",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_2($|,)") ~ "p108_2",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_280($|,)") ~ "p108_280",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p102_357($|,)") ~ "p102_357",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p102_290($|,)") ~ "p102_290",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p102_280($|,)") ~ "p102_280",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_215($|,)") ~ "p108_215",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_212($|,)") ~ "p108_212",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_3($|,)") ~ "p108_3",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_266($|,)") ~ "p108_266",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_1($|,)") ~ "p108_1",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_206($|,)") ~ "p108_206",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_208($|,)") ~ "p108_208",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_205($|,)") ~ "p108_205",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_4($|,)") ~ "p108_4",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p102_768($|,)") ~ "p102_768",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_11($|,)") ~ "p108_11",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_263($|,)") ~ "p108_263",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p108_6($|,)") ~ "p108_6",
                                  str_detect(clone_id, "p102_389($|,)") ~ "p102_389"))
  return(md)
  
}

P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  cast_clones()
P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data %>%
  cast_clones()
P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  cast_clones()

P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  cast_clones()
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  cast_clones()
P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  cast_clones()
P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data %>%
  cast_clones()
```

# P102TA
## Puck 10

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_10_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### TS vs VR
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```


#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i > j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_10_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
         barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),

         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P102TA_10_RNA <- subset(P102TA_10_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Puck 17

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_17_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_17_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### No virus reactive TCRs


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_17_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_17_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P102TA_17_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P102TA_17_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P102TA_17_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P102TA_17_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P102TA_17_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_17_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P102TA_17_RNA <- subset(P102TA_17_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Puck 33

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_33_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_33_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_33_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_33_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_33_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_33_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```
#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```


##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P102TA_33_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P102TA_33_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P102TA_33_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P102TA_33_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### TS vs VR
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```


##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(VR_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P102TA_33_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P102TA_33_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = VR_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P102TA_33_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        VR_list[[j]] <- P102TA_33_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i > j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_33_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P102TA_33_RNA <- subset(P102TA_33_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Puck 39

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_39_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_39_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_39_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_39_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P102T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_39_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P102T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P102TA_39_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```


##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P102TA_39_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P102TA_39_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P102TA_39_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P102TA_39_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### TS vs VR
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i > j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data <- P102TA_39_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P102TA_39_RNA <- subset(P102TA_39_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```



# P107TA
## Puck 15

### No TS beads

### No VR beads

## Puck 18

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_18_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P107T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_18_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P107T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### No VR beads


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_18_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_18_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_18_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P107TA_18_RNA <- subset(P107TA_18_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Puck 20

### No TS beads

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_20_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P107T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_20_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P107T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_20_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P107T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P107TA_20_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data <- P107TA_20_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P107TA_20_RNA <- subset(P107TA_20_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

# P108TA
## Puck 26

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_26_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_26_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_26_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_26_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_26_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_26_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TA_26_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_26_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### TS vs VR
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(VR_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TA_26_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_26_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = VR_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        VR_list[[j]] <- P108TA_26_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```


#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_26_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[13]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[13]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[14]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[14]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[15]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[15]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[16]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[16]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[17]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[17]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[18]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[18]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[19]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[19]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[20]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[20]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[21]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[21]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[22]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[22]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[23]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[23]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[24]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[24]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[25]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[25]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[26]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[26]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[27]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[27]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[28]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[28]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[29]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[29]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[30]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[30]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[31]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[31]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[32]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[32]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[6]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P108TA_26_RNA <- subset(P108TA_26_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```


## Puck 29

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_29_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TA_29_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_29_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### TS vs VR
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(VR_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TA_29_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_29_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = VR_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        VR_list[[j]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```
