#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(names(VR_list[i]) != names(VR_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TA_29_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_29_RNA, tex_beads = VR_list[[i]], tmem_beads = VR_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        VR_list[[i]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        VR_list[[j]] <- P108TA_29_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```


#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_29_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[13]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[13]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[14]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[14]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[15]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[15]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[16]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[16]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[17]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[17]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[18]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[18]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[19]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[19]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[20]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[20]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[21]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[21]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[22]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[22]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[23]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[23]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[24]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[24]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[25]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[25]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[26]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[26]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[27]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[27]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[28]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[28]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[29]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[29]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[30]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[30]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[31]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[31]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[32]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[32]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[6]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P108TA_29_RNA <- subset(P108TA_29_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Puck 30

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_30_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_30_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### No virus reactive TCRs

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_30_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_30_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TA_30_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_30_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_30_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TA_30_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_30_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[13]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[13]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[14]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[14]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[15]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[15]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[16]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[16]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[17]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[17]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[18]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[18]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[19]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[19]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[20]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[20]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[21]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[21]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[22]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[22]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[23]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[23]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[24]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[24]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[25]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[25]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[26]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[26]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[27]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[27]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[28]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[28]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[29]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[29]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[30]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[30]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[31]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[31]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[32]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[32]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P108TA_30_RNA <- subset(P108TA_30_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Puck 32

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_32_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_32_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### No virus reactive TCRs


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_32_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TA_32_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TA_32_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TA_32_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TA_32_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TA_32_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```


#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data <- P108TA_32_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[13]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[13]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[14]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[14]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[15]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[15]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[16]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[16]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[17]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[17]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[18]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[18]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[19]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[19]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[20]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[20]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[21]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[21]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[22]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[22]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[23]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[23]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[24]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[24]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[25]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[25]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[26]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[26]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[27]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[27]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[28]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[28]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[29]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[29]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[30]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[30]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[31]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[31]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[32]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[32]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P108TA_32_RNA <- subset(P108TA_32_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

# P108TB

## Puck 06

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_06_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_06_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_06_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_06_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_06_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_06_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TB_06_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TB_06_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TB_06_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TB_06_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### TS vs VR
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[13]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[13]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[14]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[14]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[15]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[15]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[16]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[16]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[17]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[17]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[18]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[18]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[19]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[19]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[20]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[20]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[21]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[21]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[22]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[22]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[23]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[23]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[24]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[24]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[25]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[25]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[26]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[26]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[27]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[27]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[28]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[28]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[29]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[29]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[30]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[30]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[31]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[31]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[32]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[32]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[6]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P108TB_06_RNA <- subset(P108TB_06_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Puck 14

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_14_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  TS_near_list <- append(TS_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")
```

### Get beads near each each TS TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
TS_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_TS_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_14_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  TS_far_list <- append(TS_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(TS_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_TS_clones, ";TS")

```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near virus reactive clones
VR_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_14_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  VR_near_list <- append(VR_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_near_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")
```

### Get beads near each each VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near tumor specific clones
VR_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_VR_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_14_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  VR_far_list <- append(VR_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Rename lists
names(VR_far_list) <- paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";", P108T_VR_clones, ";VR")

```


### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the near distance
```{r}
# Get the beads near non-TS or VR clones
other_near_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_14_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[1], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[1])
  other_near_list <- append(other_near_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_near_list <- collapse_list(other_near_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[1], "-", upper_radius.vec[1], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Get beads near any non-TS or VR TCR at the far distance
```{r}
# Get the beads far from non-TS or VR clones
other_far_list <- list()

for(clone in P108T_other_clones){
  result_list <- get_beads_near_specific_TCR(P108TB_14_RNA, cln = clone, lower_radius = lower_radius.vec[2], upper_radius = upper_radius.vec[2])
  other_far_list <- append(other_far_list, list(result_list))
}

# Collapse into one list
other_far_list <- collapse_list(other_far_list, name = paste0("r", lower_radius.vec[2], "-", upper_radius.vec[2], ";p10;Other"))

```

### Merge TS distances, and VR distances
```{r}
TS_list <- c(TS_near_list, TS_far_list)
VR_list <- c(VR_near_list, VR_far_list)
other_list <- c(other_near_list, other_far_list)
```

### Check for overlaps

#### TS vs TS
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(TS_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TB_14_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TB_14_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = TS_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TB_14_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        TS_list[[j]] <- P108TB_14_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_ts.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(TS_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, TS_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(TS_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_ts.df <- rbind(ts_vs_ts.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_ts.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_ts.df <- ts_vs_ts.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_ts.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs TS beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### TS vs VR
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

##### Reassign overlapping beads
```{r, message = FALSE}
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(names(TS_list[i]) != names(VR_list[j])){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		
  		if(same_beads > 0){
  		  # Reassign overlapping beads
  		  P108TB_14_reassigned <- reassign_overlapping_beads(P108TB_14_RNA, tex_beads = TS_list[[i]], tmem_beads = VR_list[[j]])
  		  
  		  # Split list back out
        TS_list[[i]] <- P108TB_14_reassigned$reassigned_tex_beads
        VR_list[[j]] <- P108TB_14_reassigned$reassigned_tmem_beads
  		}
	  }
	}
}
```

##### Check reassignment
```{r}
ts_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(TS_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(TS_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(TS_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		ts_vs_vr.df <- rbind(ts_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	}
}

colnames(ts_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
ts_vs_vr.df <- ts_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(ts_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby TS beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### VR vs VR
```{r}
vr_vs_vr.df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	for(j in 1:length(VR_list)) {
	  if(i < j){
  		same_beads <- length(intersect(VR_list[[i]]$near_beads$barcode, VR_list[[j]]$near_beads$barcode))
  		new_row <- c(names(VR_list)[i], names(VR_list)[j], same_beads)
  		vr_vs_vr.df <- rbind(vr_vs_vr.df, new_row)
	  }
	}
}

colnames(vr_vs_vr.df) <- c("tcr1", "tcr2", "beads")

# Reformat
vr_vs_vr.df <- vr_vs_vr.df %>%
	pivot_wider(names_from=tcr2,values_from=beads) %>%
	column_to_rownames("tcr1") %>%
	as.matrix()

Heatmap(vr_vs_vr.df,
        col = colors,
        na_col = "grey80",
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_title = "Overlap of nearby VR beads vs VR beads",
        name = "No. of\nbeads")
```

#### Check number of clones
```{r}
TS_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(TS_list))){
  count <- nrow(TS_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  TS_count <- TS_count + count
}
VR_count <- 0
for(i in c(1: length(VR_list))){
  count <- nrow(VR_list[[i]]$TCRs)
  VR_count <- VR_count + count
}
paste0("TS TCRs: ", TS_count)
paste0("VR TCRs: ", VR_count)
```

### Attach assignments to original Seurat object and filter for defined beads
```{r}
P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_14_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(barcode %in% TS_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[6]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[7]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[7]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[8]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[8]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[9]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[9]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[10]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[10]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[11]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[11]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[12]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[12]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[13]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[13]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[14]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[14]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[15]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[15]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[16]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[16]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[17]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[17]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[18]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[18]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[19]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[19]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[20]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[20]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[21]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[21]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[22]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[22]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[23]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[23]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[24]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[24]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[25]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[25]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[26]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[26]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[27]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[27]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[28]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[28]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[29]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[29]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[30]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[30]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[31]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[31]),
                          barcode %in% TS_list[[32]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(TS_list[32]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[2]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[3]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[3]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[4]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[4]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[5]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[5]),
                          barcode %in% VR_list[[6]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(VR_list[6]),
         # Due to the way mutate is implemented, any previously beads assigned to be a TS or VR will not be given the "Other" label
                          barcode %in% other_list[[1]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[1]),
                          barcode %in% other_list[[2]]$near_beads$barcode ~ names(other_list[2])),
         muscat = case_when(!is.na(type) ~ "Defined",
                             is.na(type) ~ "Undefined"),
         general_type = str_replace(type, "p10.*(?<=;)", ""),
         distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3))

P108TB_14_RNA <- subset(P108TB_14_RNA, subset = muscat == "Defined")
```

## Format RNA objects
### Normalize counts
```{r, message = FALSE}
P102TA_10_RNA <- NormalizeData(P102TA_10_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P102TA_33_RNA <- NormalizeData(P102TA_33_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P102TA_17_RNA <- NormalizeData(P102TA_17_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P102TA_39_RNA <- NormalizeData(P102TA_39_RNA, assay = "Spatial")

P107TA_18_RNA <- NormalizeData(P107TA_18_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P107TA_20_RNA <- NormalizeData(P107TA_20_RNA, assay = "Spatial")

P108TA_26_RNA <- NormalizeData(P108TA_26_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P108TA_29_RNA <- NormalizeData(P108TA_29_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P108TA_30_RNA <- NormalizeData(P108TA_30_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P108TA_32_RNA <- NormalizeData(P108TA_32_RNA, assay = "Spatial")

P108TB_06_RNA <- NormalizeData(P108TB_06_RNA, assay = "Spatial")
P108TB_14_RNA <- NormalizeData(P108TB_14_RNA, assay = "Spatial")

```


## Open gene sets for GSEA
```{r}
gene_sets <- readRDS("../objects/immune_gene_sets.Rds")

gs_of_int <- gene_sets[c("nieto_b_prolif", "nieto_b", "nieto_b_plasma", "projecTILs.CD4.NaiveLike", "projecTILs.CD8.NaiveLike", "projecTILs.CD4.Treg",
                         "nieto_mac_spp1", "nieto_tam_c1qc", "nieto_tam_proinflam", "nieto_myeloid_prolif", "nieto_mono", "nieto_cdc", "nieto_pdc", "nieto_mdc", "nieto_mast", "Guimaraes.Mac_AgPres", "Guimaraes.Mac_IFN", "Guimaraes.RTM_LA")]
```

## Calculate signature scores and stats
### Calculate a B cell and plasma score
```{r}
pucks <- merge(x = P102TA_10_RNA, y = list(P102TA_17_RNA, P102TA_33_RNA, P102TA_39_RNA, P107TA_18_RNA, P107TA_20_RNA, P108TA_26_RNA, P108TA_29_RNA, P108TA_30_RNA, P108TA_32_RNA, P108TB_06_RNA, P108TB_14_RNA))

pucks <- AddModuleScore(pucks, features = list(gene_sets$nieto_b), name = "nieto.b")
pucks <- AddModuleScore(pucks, features = list(gene_sets$nieto_b_plasma), name = "nieto.plasma")

```

## Count how many beads per puck
```{r}
pucks@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(muscat, orig.ident)
```

### Calculate the median plasma score of each neoantigen
```{r}
pucks@meta.data <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  mutate(distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         distance = case_when(is.na(distance) ~ "Other",
                              T ~ distance),
         final_clone_id = str_split_i(type, ";", 2),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3),
         specificity = case_when(is.na(specificity) ~ "Other",
                                 T ~ specificity),
         Patient = str_sub(orig.ident, start = 1, end = 5),
         Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity))
  
median.df <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  group_by(final_clone_id, distance, specificity, Patient) %>%
  summarize(median_b = round(median(nieto.b1), 4),
            median_plasma = round(median(nieto.plasma1), 4),
            count = n()) %>%
  filter(Patient != "P107T",
         specificity != "Other")

```

# Plot mean B and plasma gene expression values
## Format near and far data into a heatmap
```{r}
pucks@meta.data <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  mutate(distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         distance = case_when(is.na(distance) ~ "Other",
                              T ~ distance),
         final_clone_id = str_split_i(type, ";", 2),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3),
         specificity = case_when(is.na(specificity) ~ "Other",
                                 T ~ specificity),
         Patient = str_sub(orig.ident, start = 1, end = 5),
         Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity))

## plasma and b
plasma_b_genes <- c(gene_sets$nieto_b, gene_sets$nieto_b_plasma)

# Remove VPREB3 and IGKV1-12
plasma_b_genes <- plasma_b_genes[!(plasma_b_genes %in% c("VPREB3", "IGKV1-12"))]

pb_counts.df <- FetchData(object = pucks, vars = plasma_b_genes, layer = "counts") %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "merged_bc")

pb_pucks.md <- pucks@meta.data[,c("Patient", "distance", "specificity", "final_clone_id")] %>%
  mutate(merged_bc = rownames(.)) %>%
  full_join(pb_counts.df, by = "merged_bc") %>%
  filter(specificity %in% c("TS", "VR"))

pb_mean.df <- pb_pucks.md %>%
  group_by(Patient, distance, specificity, final_clone_id) %>%
  summarize(num = n(),
            across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Patient %in% c("P102T", "P108T"))

# Add phenotypes to mean df
unique_scrna_phenotypes <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone, PrimaryCluster)

pb_mean.df <- unique_scrna_phenotypes %>%
  right_join(pb_mean.df, by = c("sctcr_clone" = "final_clone_id"))

pb_mean.mat <- pb_mean.df[,-c(1:6)] %>%
  t()

pb_mean.md <- pb_mean.df[,c(1:6)] %>%
  mutate(Patient_specificity_distance = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity, "_", distance),
         Patient_specificity_distance = factor(Patient_specificity_distance, levels = c("P108T_TS_r0-30", "P108T_TS_r100-145", "P108T_VR_r0-30", "P108T_VR_r100-145", "P102T_TS_r0-30", "P102T_TS_r100-145", "P102T_VR_r0-30", "P102T_VR_r100-145")))

```

#### Build row annotation
```{r}
pb_gene.md <- do.call(list, list(gene_sets$nieto_b, gene_sets$nieto_b_plasma))

names(pb_gene.md) <- c("B cell", "Plasma cell")

pb_gene.md <- pb_gene.md %>%
  enframe(name = "cell_type", value = "gene") %>% 
  unnest(gene)

pb_gene.md <- pb_gene.md[c(pb_gene.md$gene %in% rownames(pb_mean.mat)),]

pb_gene.md <- pb_gene.md %>%
  # Remove duplicated genes
  filter(!(cell_type == "Plasma cell" & gene %in% c("POU2AF1", "CD79A")))

row_annot <- rowAnnotation(Cell_type = pb_gene.md$cell_type)
```

### Plot heatmap
```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 17}
col_annot <- HeatmapAnnotation(Patient = pb_mean.md$Patient,
                           Distance = pb_mean.md$distance,
                           Specificity = pb_mean.md$specificity,
                           Area = pb_mean.md$area_final,
                           Phenotype = pb_mean.md$PrimaryCluster,
                          `TS Score` = pb_mean.md$ts21,
                           col = list(Patient = c("P102T" = "#FF9300", "P107T" = "#FF8AD8", "P108T" = "#009193"),
                                      Distance = c("r0-30" = "grey40", "r100-145" = "grey80", "Other" = "grey90"),
                                      Specificity = c("VR" = "navyblue", "TS" = "red", "Other" = "grey"),
                                      Area = c("Boundary" = "#ff8f1b", "TLS" = "#8A9A5B", "Tumor" = "#974000"),
                                      Phenotype = c("Tmem" = "#0330F3", "Tex" = "#931101", "Treg" = "#ff4ff0")
                                      ),
                           simple_anno_size = unit(0.7, "cm"),
                           annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
                           border = TRUE)


c_col = colorRamp2(c(0, 1.5), c("grey90", "red"))

hm <- Heatmap(pb_mean.mat,
        top_annotation = col_annot,
        # Rows
        row_split = pb_gene.md$cell_type,
        row_title_rot = 0,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_row_slices = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
        row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
        # Columns
        column_split = pb_mean.md$Patient_specificity_distance,
        cluster_column_slices = FALSE,
        column_title = " ",
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        column_labels = pb_mean.md$num,
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
        column_names_side = "bottom",
        column_names_rot = -90,
        # Misc
        col = c_col,
        border_gp = gpar(col = "black"),
        name = "Mean\nexpr.")

hm
```

### Plot boxplot
```{r}
median.df <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  group_by(final_clone_id, distance, specificity, Patient) %>%
  summarize(median_b = round(median(nieto.b1), 4),
            median_plasma = round(median(nieto.plasma1), 4),
            count = n()) %>%
  filter(Patient != "P107T",
         specificity != "Other")

ggplot(median.df, aes(x = distance, y = median_plasma)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = distance)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Patient, group = final_clone_id)) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(Patient~specificity, scale = "free") +
  geom_line(aes(color = Patient, group = final_clone_id)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("P102T" = "#FF9300", "P108T" = "#009193")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey40", "grey90")) +
  ylab("Median Plasma Score") +
  xlab("Distance") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.052, -0.021))

ggplot(median.df, aes(x = distance, y = median_b)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = distance)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Patient, group = final_clone_id)) +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(Patient~specificity, scale = "free") +
  geom_line(aes(color = Patient, group = final_clone_id)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("P102T" = "#FF9300", "P108T" = "#009193")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey40", "grey90")) +
  ylab("Median B Cell Score") +
  xlab("Distance") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.215, 0.009))

```

# Plot T cell phenotypes gene expression
```{r}
extra <- list(exhaustion = c('PDCD1', 'TIGIT', 'LAG3', 'HAVCR2', 'CTLA4', 'TOX'), memory = c('TCF7', 'SELL', 'IL7R', 'CCR7', 'CD28'), ts = c("KRT86", "RDH10", "TYMS", "HMOX1", "GNG4", "CXCL13", "AFAP1L2", "ACP5", "MYO1E", "LAYN", "TNS3", "TNFSF4", "AKAP5", "HAVCR2", "ENTPD1", "SLC2A8", "AC243829.4", "ZBED2", "MCM5", "CAV1", "GOLIM4", "TRAV21", "VCAM1", "PON2", "MTSS1", "CD38", "TRBV11-2", "MS4A6A", "TOX2", "CSF1", "GALNT2", "FXYD2", "PLPP1", "LMCD1", "MYL6B", "LAG3", "HLA-DRA", "IGFLR1", "CCDC50", "CD27", "KIAA1324", "CDKN2A", "CD70", "ABHD6", "CTLA4", "PDCD1", "GEM", "NUSAP1", "TOX", "CXCR6", "NMB", "HOPX", "CLIC3", "INPP5F", "SNAP47", "TSHZ2", "HLA-DMA", "SIT1", "HLA-DRB1", "TUBB", "PYCARD", "ADGRG1", "HLA-DQA1", "PRF1", "HLA-DPA1", "PTMS", "CKS1B", "HIPK2", "CHST12", "LSP1", "FAM3C", "SLC1A4", "NUDT1", "DNPH1"), vr = c("RARA", "GADD45B", "C1orf21", "AOAH", "MATK", "SATB1", "MBP", "ANTXR2", "RORA", "CCR7", "ANXA1", "BACH2", "GLUL", "TNFSF14", "AUTS2", "PERP", "EPHA4", "TCF7", "SELL", "MYC", "IL7R", "CD300A", "ITGA5", "GPR183", "KLF3", "S1PR1"))

```

### Merge RNA objects
```{r}
pucks <- merge(x = P102TA_10_RNA, y = list(P102TA_17_RNA, P102TA_33_RNA, P102TA_39_RNA, P108TA_26_RNA, P108TA_29_RNA, P108TA_30_RNA, P108TA_32_RNA, P108TB_06_RNA, P108TB_14_RNA))

pucks <- AddModuleScore(object = pucks, features = c(extra), name = names(c(extra)), slot = "data")

# Update metadata
pucks@meta.data <- pucks@meta.data %>%
  mutate(distance = str_split_i(type, ";", 1),
         distance = case_when(is.na(distance) ~ "Other",
                              T ~ distance),
         final_clone_id = str_split_i(type, ";", 2),
         specificity = str_split_i(type, ";", 3),
         specificity = case_when(is.na(specificity) ~ "Other",
                                 T ~ specificity),
         Patient = str_sub(orig.ident, start = 1, end = 5),
         Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity))

pucks[['Spatial']] <- JoinLayers(pucks[['Spatial']])

```

## Format near and far data into a heatmap for supplement
```{r}
genes_of_int <- c("PDCD1", "CTLA4", "TIGIT", "LAG3", "HAVCR2", "TOX", "CCR7", "TCF7", "SELL", "IL7R", "CD28", "PRF1", "GZMH", "GZMK", "GZMB", "GZMA", "GNLY", "MKI67", "STMN1", "BCL6", "CXCL13", "CXCR5", "FOXP3")

counts.df <- FetchData(object = pucks, vars = genes_of_int, layer = "counts") %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "merged_bc")

pucks.md <- pucks@meta.data[,c("Patient", "distance", "specificity", "final_clone_id", "ts3", "vr4", "exhaustion1", "memory2")] %>%
  mutate(merged_bc = rownames(.)) %>%
  full_join(counts.df, by = "merged_bc") %>%
  filter(specificity %in% c("TS", "VR"))

mean.df <- pucks.md %>%
  group_by(Patient, distance, specificity, final_clone_id) %>%
  summarize(num = n(),
            across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Patient %in% c("P102T", "P108T"),
         distance != "r100-145")

# Add phenotypes to mean df
unique_scrna_phenotypes <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone, PrimaryCluster)

mean.df <- unique_scrna_phenotypes %>%
  right_join(mean.df, by = c("sctcr_clone" = "final_clone_id"))

mean.mat <- mean.df[,-c(1:10)] %>%
  t()

scaled_mean.mat <- t(scale(t(mean.mat)))

mean.md <- mean.df[,c(1:10)] %>%
  mutate(Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity),
         Patient_specificity = factor(Patient_specificity, levels = c("P108T_TS", "P108T_VR", "P108T_Other", "P102T_TS", "P102T_VR", "P102T_Other")))

```

#### Build row annotation
```{r}
exhaustion <- c("PDCD1", "CTLA4", "TIGIT", "LAG3", "HAVCR2", "TOX")
memory <- c("CCR7", "TCF7", "SELL", "IL7R", "CD28")
cytotoxicity <- c("PRF1", "GZMH", "GZMK", "GZMB", "GZMA", "GNLY")
proliferation <- c("MKI67", "STMN1") 
tfh <- c("BCL6", "CXCL13", "CXCR5")
treg <- c("FOXP3")

gene.md <- do.call(list, list(exhaustion, memory, cytotoxicity, proliferation, tfh, treg))

names(gene.md) <- c("Exhaustion", "Memory", "Cytotoxicity", "Proliferation", "Tfh", "Treg")

gene.md <- gene.md %>%
  enframe(name = "cell_type", value = "gene") %>% 
  unnest(gene) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Memory", "Exhaustion", "Cytotoxicity", "Proliferation", "Tfh", "Treg")))

row_annot <- rowAnnotation(Cell_type = gene.md$cell_type)
```

### Plot supplementary heatmapheatmap
```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 7}
col_annot <- HeatmapAnnotation(Patient = mean.md$Patient,
                           # Distance = mean.md$distance,
                           Specificity = mean.md$specificity,
                           Area = mean.md$area_final,
                           Phenotype = mean.md$PrimaryCluster,
                           col = list(Patient = c("P102T" = "#FF9300", "P107T" = "#FF8AD8", "P108T" = "#009193"),
                                      # Distance = c("r0-30" = "grey40", "r100-145" = "grey80", "Other" = "grey90"),
                                      Specificity = c("VR" = "navyblue", "TS" = "red", "Other" = "grey"),
                                      Area = c("Boundary" = "#ff8f1b", "TLS" = "#8A9A5B", "Tumor" = "#974000"),
                                      Phenotype = c("Tmem" = "#0330F3", "Tex" = "#931101", "Treg" = "#ff4ff0")),
                           simple_anno_size = unit(0.7, "cm"),
                           annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
                           border = TRUE)


c_col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.1), c("grey90", "red"))

hm_sup <- Heatmap(mean.mat,
        top_annotation = col_annot,
        # Rows
        row_split = gene.md$cell_type,
        row_title_rot = 0,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_row_slices = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12),
        row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
        # Columns
        column_split = mean.md$Patient_specificity,
        cluster_column_slices = FALSE,
        column_title = " ",
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
        column_names_side = "bottom",
        column_names_rot = -90,
        # Misc
        col = c_col,
        border_gp = gpar(col = "black"),
        name = "Mean\nexpr.")

draw(hm_sup, padding = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 10), "mm"))
```

# Plot cell type gene expression
```{r}
genes_of_int <- c("CD3E", "CD4", "CD8A", "CD8B", "BANK1", "CD19", "MS4A1", "FCRLA", "IGKC", "IGHG1", "IGHG3", "JCHAIN", "MZB1", "SDC1", "TNFRSF17", "SPP1", "APOE", "CD163", "ARG1", "MRC1", "IL10", "FTL", "FN1", "LGALS9", "CD68", "CD14", "C1QB", "CD80", "CD86", "IL1B", "FCGR3A", "S100A8", "S100A9")

counts.df <- FetchData(object = pucks, vars = genes_of_int, layer = "counts") %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "merged_bc")

pucks.md <- pucks@meta.data[,c("Patient", "distance", "specificity", "final_clone_id", "ts3", "vr4", "exhaustion1", "memory2")] %>%
  mutate(merged_bc = rownames(.)) %>%
  full_join(counts.df, by = "merged_bc") %>%
  filter(specificity %in% c("TS", "VR"))

mean.df <- pucks.md %>%
  group_by(Patient, distance, specificity, final_clone_id) %>%
  summarize(num = n(),
            across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(Patient %in% c("P102T", "P108T"),
         distance != "r100-145")

# Add phenotypes to mean df
unique_scrna_phenotypes <- scrna_phenotypes %>%
  distinct(sctcr_clone, PrimaryCluster)

mean.df <- unique_scrna_phenotypes %>%
  right_join(mean.df, by = c("sctcr_clone" = "final_clone_id"))

mean.mat <- mean.df[,-c(1:10)] %>%
  t()

scaled_mean.mat <- t(scale(t(mean.mat)))

mean.md <- mean.df[,c(1:10)] %>%
  mutate(Patient_specificity = paste0(Patient, "_", specificity),
         Patient_specificity = factor(Patient_specificity, levels = c("P108T_TS", "P108T_VR", "P108T_Other", "P102T_TS", "P102T_VR", "P102T_Other")))

```

#### Build row annotation
```{r}
t_cell <- c("CD3E", "CD4", "CD8A", "CD8B") 
b_cell <- c("BANK1", "CD19", "MS4A1", "FCRLA")
plasma <- c("IGKC", "IGHG1", "IGHG3", "JCHAIN", "MZB1", "SDC1", "TNFRSF17")
mac_immunosup <- c("SPP1", "APOE", "CD163", "ARG1", "MRC1", "IL10", "FTL", "FN1", "LGALS9")
macrophage <- c("CD68", "CD14", "C1QB", "CD80", "CD86")
mac_proinf <- c("IL1B", "FCGR3A")
monocyte <- c("S100A8", "S100A9")

gene.md <- do.call(list, list(t_cell, b_cell, plasma, mac_immunosup, macrophage, mac_proinf, monocyte))

names(gene.md) <- c("T", "B", "Plasma/Ig", "Suppress. Mac", "Mac.", "Inflamm. Mac.", "Mono.")

gene.md <- gene.md %>%
  enframe(name = "cell_type", value = "gene") %>% 
  unnest(gene) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("T", "B", "Plasma/Ig", "Mono.", "Mac.", "Suppress. Mac",  "Inflamm. Mac.")))

row_annot <- rowAnnotation(Cell_type = gene.md$cell_type)
```

### Plot heatmap
```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 11}
col_annot <- HeatmapAnnotation(Patient = mean.md$Patient,
                           # Distance = mean.md$distance,
                           Specificity = mean.md$specificity,
                           Area = mean.md$area_final,
                           Phenotype = mean.md$PrimaryCluster,
                           col = list(Patient = c("P102T" = "#FF9300", "P107T" = "#FF8AD8", "P108T" = "#009193"),
                                      Area = c("Boundary" = "#ff8f1b", "TLS" = "#8A9A5B", "Tumor" = "#974000"),
                                      Phenotype = c("Tmem" = "#0330F3", "Tex" = "#931101", "Treg" = "#ff4ff0"),
                                      Specificity = c("VR" = "navyblue", "TS" = "red", "Other" = "grey"),
                                      `TS Score` = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.1), c("grey90", "red")),
                                      `VR Score` = colorRamp2(c(-0.04, 0.04), c("grey90", "#0330F3"))),
                           simple_anno_size = unit(0.7, "cm"),
                           annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
                           border = TRUE)


c_col = colorRamp2(c(0, 0.9, 1.5), c("grey90", "red", "red"))
hm_main <- Heatmap(mean.mat,
        top_annotation = col_annot,
        # Rows
        row_split = gene.md$cell_type,
        row_title_rot = 0,
        show_row_dend = FALSE,
        cluster_row_slices = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12),
        row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
        # Columns
        column_split = mean.md$Patient_specificity,
        cluster_column_slices = FALSE,
        column_title = " ",
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        column_labels = mean.md$num,
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
        column_names_side = "bottom",
        column_names_rot = -90,
        # Misc
        col = c_col,
        border_gp = gpar(col = "black"),
        name = "Mean\nexpr.")

draw(hm_main, padding = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 10), "mm"))
```

# Get session info
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
